text: Scaling Policies @ sttt © s e Manual Scaling - Manually adjust the desired capacity e Scheduled Scaling - Time based adjustment - e.g. Sales.. e Dynamic Scaling e Simple - “CPU above 50% +1", “CPU Below 50 -1" e Stepped Scaling - Bigger +/- based on difference e Target Tracking - Desired Aggregate CPU = 40% ..ASG handle it Cooldown Periods ...
